min_child_entry_age.source_quote: born during the Policy Period and is aged upto 90 days

sum_insured_options.source_quote: New Business Base Sum Insured (in lakhs) Plus: 5 Power: 10, 15, 20 Prime: 25, 30, 50, 100, 300, 500

grace_period.source_quote: grace period for payment of the premium for all types of insurance policies shall be: fifteen days where premium payment mode is monthly and thirty days in all other cases

free_look_period.source_quote: sured Person shall be allowed free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 4.1.1. Pre-Existing Diseases (Code- Excl 01) i. Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36months of continuous coverage after the

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: the treatment of the following listed conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage, as may b

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: This benefit shall become available only after the expiry of the waiting periods mentioned below: Policy Period 1 and 2 years Waiting Period* 24 months

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (IndusInd Health Gain covers all day-care up to SI; ~540 standard)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 10,000+ Network Hospitals (homepage 'Find nearest hospital' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: If the Insured Person is diagnosed with any Illness or suffers any Injury that requires Hospitalization, (including Hospitalization under AYUSH Treatment), during the Policy Period, then the Company shall pay Medical Expenses incurred by the Policyholder/Insured

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Expenses means i. Medical Treatment Expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during hospitalization)

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while confined at

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless Facility means a facility extended by the Company to the Insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the Insured in accordance with the Policy Terms and Conditions, are directly ma

geographic_coverage.source_quote: the Insured(s) travels outside India during the Policy Year, they may choose to pause this Policy

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: in respect of that Insured Person (on Individual basis) or all Insured Persons (on Floater basis) during the Policy Year

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: The Company shall provide 33.33 % (one third) of the Base Sum Insured as Cumulative Bonus at the end of each completed and continuous Policy Year, provided that no Claim has been made in the expiring Policy Year.
